title: cynometra alexandri
intro: Cynometra alexandri, also known as the African cork tree or Alexandrian breadnut, is a species of tree in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cynometra alexandri include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's seeds, bark, and leaves are used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments.
